Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./_c.json'\); console.log\('réponse:', \(j.response||''\).slice\(0,80\)\); console.log\('APERÇU → ajouts:', j.preview?j.preview.counts.added:'?', '| retraits:', j.preview?j.preview.counts.removed:'?', '\(focalisé = peu, PAS 60\)'\); if\(j.preview\){ console.log\('Détail:'\); j.preview.creates.forEach\(c=>console.log\('   +', c.title, new Date\(c.start\).toLocaleString\('fr-FR',{weekday:'short',hour:'2-digit'}\)\)\); j.preview.deletes.forEach\(c=>console.log\('   -', c.title\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const h=require\('./habits.json'\);const c=h.find\(x=>/courir/i.test\(x.name\)\);console.log\(c?\('  Courir -> idealDays='+JSON.stringify\(c.idealDays\)+' timesPerWeek='+c.timesPerWeek\):'  \(Courir absent\)'\); const bad=h.find\(x=>/modifie/i.test\(x.name\)\);console.log\(bad?\('  ❌ habitude parasite creee: '+bad.name\):'  ✅ aucune habitude parasite \\"Modifie...\\"'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const m=fs.readFileSync\('app.html','utf8'\).match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*\)<\\/script>/\);try{ new Function\(m[1]\); console.log\('✅ app.html JS OK'\); }catch\(e\){ console.log\('❌ JS ERROR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('app.html','utf8'\);const b=[...html.matchAll\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\)];let ok=true;b.forEach\(\(x,i\)=>{try{new Function\(x[1]\)}catch\(e\){ok=false;console.log\('❌#'+i,e.message\)}}\);console.log\(ok?'✅ app.html OK \('+b.length+' scripts\)':''\)")
